name: @pochta-chat/sdk
description: Framework-agnostic client SDK for Pochta — self-owned identity, end-to-end sign-then-seal crypto, relay transport, message ops, calls, and media. Ships no storage engine and no UI; you inject those.
comment: v0.1 ships TypeScript source (exports → ./src/index.ts); the web app consumes it via the @pochta-chat/sdk workspace dep + a Vite/tsconfig alias to the source. To publish to npm under @pochta-chat: add a build step (tsc/tsup → dist) and point exports/types at the compiled output.
